chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Misc. Application No. 174 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of main case. 30-03-2023 Mr. Amir Nawaz Waraich, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Talib Ali Memon, APG. ============= Omar Sial, J: The investigating officer of the case has explained to me that the applicant Misal Khan is an accused in F.I.R. No. 6 of 2023 registered under sections 411 and 34 P.P.C. at the Railway Landhi police station. He has further explained that a truck was caught which had 2 categories of material on it; one was that belonging to the Railways whereas the other was the one that ostensibly was the Railways and thus is case property. He categorically submitted that the Railways has no interest in the first category of material on the truck and that that is not case property. This material, which is apparently scrap, is not required in the case originating out of F.I.R. No. 6 of 2023. He also confirms that there is no claimant to that scrap except the applicant. 2. In view of the above, the scrap that is not part of the case property may be returned to the applicant; however, a P.R. Bond in the sum of Rs. 500,000, together with a copy of his National Identity Card should be kept on the case file of F.I.R. No. 6 of 2023. 3. Application allowed in the above terms. JUDGE
